theme: 5 mistakes HR makes planning corporate events

linkedin.text:
The most expensive event mistake costs nothing upfront: choosing the destination before defining the goal.

After 200+ events in 120+ countries since 2010, these are the 5 we see HR teams repeat:

❌ Picking WHERE before WHY — the best event starts with the objective
❌ Booking the cheapest option — a bad experience outlives a good one
❌ Overloading the agenda — downtime is where real connection happens
❌ Ignoring dietary and cultural needs — one missed allergy overshadows three perfect days
❌ DIY-ing to "save money" — your team's planning hours are a hidden cost that dwarfs any fee

The companies with the best events don't plan events. They partner with people who live them.

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' for our full pre-event planning checklist.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #EventPlanning #Leadership

instagram.text:
5 event mistakes that quietly wreck your budget. 🛑

After 200+ events, here's what we keep seeing:

1️⃣ Choosing WHERE before WHY
2️⃣ Going cheap (bad experiences are remembered longest)
3️⃣ Overloading the agenda (downtime = real connection)
4️⃣ Ignoring dietary & cultural needs (one miss ruins it)
5️⃣ DIY-ing to "save money" (the hidden costs are brutal)

The fix? Stop planning events. Start partnering with people who live them. 💛

Save this and tag the HR lead about to book one.

📩 Link in bio.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #EventPlanning #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture #MICE

facebook.text:
Planning a company event? These 5 mistakes cost more than any vendor fee. 🤔

1. Picking the destination before the goal
2. Going with the cheapest option (your team will remember)
3. Cramming too much into the agenda
4. Forgetting dietary and cultural needs
5. Doing it yourself to "save money"

After 200+ events across 120+ countries since 2010, we've seen each one sink a great idea.

The best events aren't built by HR teams burning the midnight oil. They're built by people who do this every day.

Which of these have you lived through? Tell us in the comments. 💬

#CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #IncentiveTravel #HRLeadership #MICE
